security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; media-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost tauri: https: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Agentic document editor for PDF, DOCX, PowerPoint & Markdown.
bundle.longDescription: WoRe by Nayhein.com — read and edit PDF, DOCX, PowerPoint (PPTX) and Markdown with an AI agent in the loop. Present slides with speaker notes and a fullscreen presenter mode. Bring your own OpenAI- or Anthropic-compatible endpoint.
